reviews.review_msg: He doesn't work at SFU anymore (I wonder why) but it's so obvious the reviews below are fake. His current reviews at the other university is a 2.7/5 average on a good day.

He is very inspirational and well connected. But he's SO last minute. If you like to start your paper 2 nights + before it's due - you're gonna have a bad time. For our major, 3 part paper, we got the first set of criteria two nights before the due date.  Unless you think the same way as him you'll get lostconfused.  Asking for helpvague answers

One of the most passionate people I've ever encountered. Michael makes course learning go beyond the curriculum and brings in current examples. He's super helpful if you see him outside of classand gives you a really good idea of what direction to take with your papers. Can't say enough good things about Markwick.

One of the most helpful profs I have encountered. He is so helpful for writing papers that he will even provide you with some of the material for it. His class is engaging and really thought provoking sometimes, when he tells stories about his former job with the Ontario Human Rights Commission

Michael Markwick is an amazing professor! Passionate, engaged, witty and full of life. Talks to his students instead of at them and really tries to create an inclusive community within the classroom. He will change the way you see education! Brilliant.
BEST PROF!! YOU ARE LUCKY TO TAKE HIS CLASS!
AWESOME!!! He is a GREAT professor! TAKE HIS CLASSES!!!
He is a nice and charming person. He helped me a lot with my term paper. Media History itself is a boring subject, but somehow he made it interesting!
Greatest prof ever. Actually talks WITH students in lecture, instead of AT them. Totally changing the way I see the world.

He is an incredibly passionate instructor - and he has increased my interest in communications subjects immensely. If you haven't experienced his teaching style - you MUST. Very engaging lectures, phenomenal feedback on essays and an incredible willingness to listen to his students. GREAT PROF!!!!
He literally changed my life, and the way I see academia.  Anyone who hasn't experienced one of his classes is missing out - BIG TIME.
The best prof at SFU..he is incredible!

When a student encounters a good prof, he/she will go on here and say "highly recommended" or things like that. But for Dr.Markwick, he deserves more than one highly. I Highly highly highly recommend him. The BEST prof at SFU! We had a lot of fun and many enjoyable conversations in class. SFU should offer him a lifetime contract!
Awesome prof. Learn alot and lectures are a blast.
Great prof.  Really helpful.  Don't be afraid to have an opinion.
This guy is a complete beauty. Helps you with the work, good sense of humor, and frequents the pub for post-class brews. Mike's legit.
Imagines himself "kewl" but is actually a narrow-minded narcissist. He has no idea.
very passionate and helpful. Always friendly and open! Great prof!
No Comments
Excellent instructor who gets students to expand their thinking and perception. Very good presenter who is helpful and communicates effectively.
No Comments
No Comments
Great prof, very inspiring. kewl dude all around who doesn't mind hanging with his students after class.
